title: Motorsport Strategy Lab - Derived Data
description: Derived, measured race-strategy data across F1, WEC and IMSA -- degradation fits, pit loss, neutralisation calibration, multi-stop plans, reliability, retrospective audit. Source code: https://github.com/mohammedmedjadj/Motorsport-Strategy-Lab . Provenance: F1 timing via FastF1; WEC/IMSA via a community-maintained multi-series dataset (huggingface: tobil/imsa). This is the project's own normalised/derived output, not a verbatim republication of any single upstream source; respect the original sources' own terms for anything beyond this derived layer. Licence marked 'other' pending explicit confirmation of upstream terms -- treat as research/educational use unless clarified.
